projects.title: Mindora
projects.description: A project tracking management app with a full-stack architecture, Docker setup, and a separate backend structure.

projects.title: Lingoria
projects.description: An automatic Indonesian-English Telegram translation bot with translation modes, chat settings, and Docker deployment.

projects.title: Jagomua
projects.description: A finance and booking platform for makeup artists built with Next.js, Express, Prisma, Firebase Auth, and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: Historia
projects.description: A Telegram bot and web dashboard to automatically log daily expenses from natural Indonesian-language messages.

projects.title: Keyphrase Extraction with TextRank
projects.description: A Flask-based REST API for automatic keyphrase extraction from Indonesian text using the TextRank algorithm.

projects.title: Secret Place
projects.description: A private mental health consultation app that connects users with psychologists and supports anonymous story sharing.
